chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2644 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.11937/2020 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 31.10.2024 Mr. Ravi Pinjani, Advocate, for the petitioner in C. P. No. D–2649/2020 and for respondent No.7 in C. P. No. D–2644/2020. Mr. Altamash Arab, Advocate for the petitioners in C. P. No. D–2644/2020. Mr. Mohamed Vawda, Advocate for respondent/NIPD&MC. Mr. Waseem Akhtar, Advocate for NEPRA. Mr. Hassaan Qamar, Advocate for respondent/K-Electric. Ms. Wajiha Mahdi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. At the outset, Counsel for the Petitioners in C.P. No.D- 2649/2020 and D-2644/2020 each submitted that the two writ petitions are in respect of different subject matters and may be de- tagged. Respondent Counsels also have no objection. We have perused the two dockets and the petitions are hereby de-tagged. The hearing of C.P. No.2644/2020 is adjourned. The Office is directed to re-list the said petition (CP No.D-2644/2020) in two weeks. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE
